F143 Rule 34.38(8) and words omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 19(17)(e) (with reg. 27 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1574 , regs. 1 , 4(2) and S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(f) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


#### Enforcement of orders of [ F144 the family court ] E+W


34.39. — [ F145 (1) A person who wishes to enforce a maintenance order obtained in the family court in a State bound by the 2007 Hague Convention must apply for a certified copy of the order and, where required by Practice Direction 34A, a certificate giving particulars relating to the judgment and proceedings in which it was given. ]


F146 (2) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .


(3) An application under this rule must be made in writing to the court officer and must specify—

metadata.title: Part 34 — Reciprocal Enforcement of Maintenance Orders
